emptyMsg:
Tap the microphone to begin
live translation of the Khutbah
micNotSupported:
Speech recognition not supported.

Android: Use Chrome
iPhone/iPad: Use Safari
micDenied: Microphone permission denied. Please allow access in your browser settings.
langNotSupported: This language is not supported for speech recognition on your device. Please try a different source language.
qLoadFail: Failed to load. Please try again.
qOffline:
📴 Offline.
Open this surah once while online to cache it.
duaEmpty: No du'as in this category yet.
prayerOfflineNone: 📴 Offline — no cached prayer data yet.
qiblaNoSensor: Qibla is {deg}° from North (no compass sensor)
setUILangHint: Changes the app interface language. Sermon translation language is set separately above.
setNoiseFilterHint: Applies highpass + lowpass filters to isolate speech and remove background noise like AC hum, crowd murmur, and echo.
setVoiceBoostHint: Amplifies the speech signal before recognition. Increase if the speaker is far from the mic or the environment is very loud.
setNoiseGateHint: Audio below this volume level is treated as background noise and muted. Higher = more aggressive noise removal but may clip quiet speech. Set to 0 to disable.
setMaxBufferHint: Forces translation after this many seconds of continuous speech — even if the speaker doesn't pause.
setSilenceWaitHint: How long to wait after the speaker pauses before translating.
settingsSaved:
Settings saved ✓
Noise filter & gate changes take effect next time you start listening.
aboutIntro: This application was created to help Muslims around the world understand Friday sermons regardless of language barriers. Whether you're a new Muslim, living abroad, or simply want to understand a sermon in a different language — this tool is for you.
aboutDevRole: Senior Corporate Trainer & Energy Systems Expert
aboutFreeMsg: This app is completely free, open-source, and made as Sadaqah Jariyah for the Muslim Ummah. Please share it with anyone who might benefit.
aboutDonateMsg: This app is free and always will be. If you'd like to support its development, please make dua for us or share it with your community.
tutWelcomeDesc: This app translates Friday sermons (Khutbah) in real-time, helping Muslims worldwide understand the beautiful teachings regardless of language barriers.
tutWelcomeTip: Works in any mosque or while watching online sermons.
tutLangDesc: Choose the Source Language (what the Imam speaks) and Translation Language (your preferred language). Only verified, working language combinations are shown.
tutLangTip: Select a regional dialect (Saudi, Egyptian, etc.) for better speech recognition accuracy.
tutMicDesc: Tap the microphone button to start. The app listens and translates automatically. The audio visualizer shows when speech is detected.
tutMicTip: Position your phone near the speaker. Allow microphone permission when prompted.
tutQuranDesc: Read Quran with Arabic text, transliteration, and translation in 30+ languages. Browse a collection of essential Du'as for daily life with meanings.
tutQuranTip: Use the translation dropdown in the Quran tab to read in your own language!
tutPlatformDesc:
Android: Use Chrome browser. Keep screen on.

iPhone/iPad: Use Safari browser. Add to Home Screen for best experience.
tutPlatformTip: The app uses dual translation engines for maximum reliability.
tutReadyDesc: May Allah bless you. This app is completely free and made with love for the Muslim Ummah. Please share it with others!
